text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has injured herself, so I take her
to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you for looking out for me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But... it's not so bad. I think I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm all patched up now, so let's keep going a bit
longer.
...What do you say?
choice_data_list: Carelessness is your most dangerous rival.
Carelessness is your most dangerous rival.
Can you try to be careful?
Can you try to be careful?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm all patched up now, so let's keep going a bit
longer.
...What do you say?
choice_data_list: Carelessness is your most dangerous rival.
Carelessness is your most dangerous rival.
Can you try to be careful?
Can you try to be careful?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But it barely even hurts. As long as I'm careful,
there shouldn't any problem...
choice_data_list: We should stop before it gets worse.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, you're right. Even a small injury can lead to
something much worse.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I'll go home and take it easy for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems disappointed after being so motivated,
but she obediently heads back to her dorm room
to rest.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'd like to finish everything we have planned
for the day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Respecting her wishes, I decide to continue
training.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Actually... It seems that I may have
underestimated how bad it is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time, we both agree to cut training short so
Satono Diamond can rest.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whew! That's the last of it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Light exercise doesn't seem to be a problem!
Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was concerned, but she doesn't seem to be in
any pain. It appears it really was a minor injury.
